stated_strategic_priorities: Diversify beyond flagship PE into credit, real estate, and climate/impact investing to build a multi-product platform
Scale AUM through transformative M&A, particularly the Angelo Gordon acquisition to establish a credit franchise
Expand wealth and retail distribution channels to access high-net-worth and semi-liquid capital pools

contextual_market_factors.tam_notes: Global alternative AUM estimated at $25T+ by 2028. TPG's $303B AUM positions it as a top-10 listed alt manager, competing in the large-cap PE, impact/climate, and expanding credit segments.
contextual_market_factors.governance_notes: Dual-class share structure with founders retaining significant voting control. IPO in January 2022 was the first major alt-manager listing since Apollo's 2011 restructuring. Partnership-to-corporate conversion accompanied the IPO.
contextual_market_factors.regulatory_notes: SEC-registered investment adviser. Subject to standard US fund management regulations. Climate-focused funds (Rise Climate) navigate evolving ESG disclosure requirements across jurisdictions.
